Learn Daily

Learn Daily is a habit-forming learning app where users pick topics of interest and receive one AI-generated learning card per topic each day. The app helps learners build consistent daily study habits with features like streak tracking, lightweight profiles, and simple topic management. Its MVP focuses on delivering high-quality, bite-sized AI-curated content to keep users engaged.

FAQs

FAQs

FAQs

All your questions, answered

All your questions, answered

Everything you want to know, before you ask.

Everything you want to know, before you ask.

Book Now

Book Now

Book Now

Do you code everything or use no-code/low-code tools?

Yes, we code everything from scratch using a modern AI-first tech stack: Next.js, Supabase, TailwindCSS, powered by tools like Cursor and Claude Code. We’ve experimented with low-code platforms before, but they’re rarely scalable for real-world products. They also end up being slower to customize, especially when features grow. Thanks to AI, writing code is now faster than ever—and gives you clean, scalable, and production-grade results.

How long does MVP development take?

Most MVPs are delivered in 21 days. That includes: * Planning your core features * Building your full frontend + backend * Launching a live, testable product If your project has more complexity or additional features, it may take 4–5 weeks—but we’ll always be transparent about timelines from day one. The speed comes from our structured AI-assisted workflow, not cutting corners.

What happens after the MVP is done?

Once your MVP is shipped, you have two clear options: * You can move to a monthly retainer, where we act as your dev team and continue building new features based on user feedback * Or we can hand over the entire codebase, written in industry-standard tools, so any developer can easily take it forward We’ll also help you transition smoothly—our code is clean, documented, and built for handoff.

What’s included in the MVP package?

Everything you need to launch fast: * 3–4 core product features (auth, payments, dashboards, etc.) * A working web app, hosted and live * A clean, fast, responsive landing page * Minimal UI design (we skip traditional design tools like Figma to move faster, but your product still looks sharp) If you need custom UI/UX design, we can add that too—but it’ll extend the timeline a bit.

My product has 10–15 core features. Can we build all of them?

That’s not an MVP and that’s okay. Our job is to help you focus. We guide you in defining the leanest version of your product that can still validate the idea. Usually, that means building 3–4 essential features and launching fast. We’ll then help plan future phases so you can scale based on real user feedback, not assumptions.

What services do you offer?

We focus on what we do best, shipping great MVPs fast. You can work with us in two ways: * Full MVP Development: from idea to launch-ready product * Landing Page Design: using Figma + Framer

Need both? We’ve got you.

We’ll host your custom landing page at yourdomain.com and your app at app.yourdomain.com so you’re ready to go from day one.
